metadata.description: Scale-local calibration for Cohen's d and SMD effect sizes
metadata.note: Calibration is scale-local. Deployment follows validation, not ambition.

workflow: 1. Run LLMMC protocol → get θ_llm, EU_llm

scientific_justification.why_scale_local: Effect size metrics have different semantics and base rates. d=0.5 ≠ 25pp in calibration space.
scientific_justification.why_not_integrated: Forcing integration with n=3 pp-anchors would create leverage artifacts.
scientific_justification.reviewer_statement: Partial, scale-specific calibration with explicit validity bounds is methodologically stronger than forced global integration.
